source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Werner folds a piece of paper as shown in the diagram. With a pair of scissors he makes two straight cuts into the paper. Then is unfolds it again. Which on the following shapes are not possible for the piece of paper to show afterwards?
<image1>
<image2>
